Projects
01
SVR Bike Document Management
A secure full-stack web app for managing bike records, buyer/seller info, and vehicle documents (RC, Insurance, Pollution, NOC). Features image uploads via Cloudinary, smart search, JWT authentication, and a responsive dashboard — deployed on Render & Vercel.
↗ Live Demo ↗ GitHub

02
Vision Track AI
Real-time Missing Person detection and face recognition using Deep Learning and ArcFace. Capable of accurate identification in live video streams — shipped and running.
